global.title: Al-Azhar Globally
global.subtitle: For over a thousand years, Al-Azhar has welcomed students from around the world, serving as a civilizational bridge connecting peoples and cultures
global.reachDescription: Al-Azhar's influence extends to every continent, welcoming students from over 100 countries and providing scholarships and diverse educational programs that serve Muslim communities worldwide.
global.heritageDescription: Al-Azhar plays a pivotal role in preserving and disseminating Islamic heritage globally through digitizing manuscripts, establishing specialized research centers, and training imams and scholars from around the world.
